This remarkable 3 BHK Flat available for sale in Parishkaar, Khokhra, Ahmedabad is a symphony of elegance and comfort, boasting spacious living areas adorned with tasteful finishes. ::::::It's not just a home; it's an invitation to a lifestyle beyond ordinary. Don't miss your chance to own this masterpiece – where every moment is a masterpiece in itself.::::::Property Specifications ::::::This remarkable flat constructed on the impressive 1414 sq ft of carpet area, awaits your discerning eye. Situated on the 12th floor of a prestigious tower of 12 floors, this exquisitely furnished with lights, fans, and ACs, it presents a blend of comfort and style that is truly unrivaled. The Italian marble flooring lends an air of opulence, while the Vastu compliance ensures harmony and positive energy throughout.::::::Every corner of this immaculate abode has been thoughtfully designed to offer the utmost in comfort and convenience. Step onto the attached balcony which opens from the hall, thereby overlooking a serene garden, and let your cares drift away.::::::A generous living cum dining area awaits your presence, furnished with a cozy sofa set and elegant dining table. Moreover, the dedicated pooja room adds a touch of spirituality to your daily routine. The modular kitchen is a chef's delight, equipped with a chimney, cabinets, a granite platform, and a stainless steel sink. Additionally, a utility room attached to the kitchen adds to your convenience. ::::::Facilities ::::::Your comfort and security are our top priorities. This property offers two covered parking spaces, 24-hour water supply, and 100% power backup, ensuring that you are never inconvenienced. And if you desire recreation, indulge yourself in the gym, take a dip in the swimming pool, or unwind in the clubhouse, garden, mini theater, or library.::::::Locality ::::::Centrally located, this property is your gateway to convenience. Renowned schools and hospitals are within a 1 to 2 km radius, making it ideal for families. Shopping malls, grocery stores, and supermarkets are equally accessible, catering to your daily needs. Banks and ATMs are conveniently located nearby, ensuring that your financial transactions are effortless. The Maninagar Railway Station is a mere 3 km away, while the Apparel Park Metro Station is within easy reach.
